name: Dazzling Rosary (Greater)
description:
Activate Cast a Spell

When energy courses through these lustrous beads, they glow brightly in the sacred colors of the spellcaster's faith. A Spiritual Weapon empowered with this catalyst flashes with bright light when it critically Strikes a target, causing the target to be Dazzled until the beginning of your next turn. The rosary can be used with a spiritual weapon of any level.

Effect: Dazzling Rosary
